response.step_by_step_log:
1. Analyzed video content, identified song title "ILLEXECUTION" from on-screen text at the start of the performance (00:35).
2. Performed web search for "ILLEXECUTION" and found original artist to be Touno Sakura (Winter Cherry).
3. Performed web search for "ILLEXECUTION" Touno Sakura Japanese and English lyrics, and found that the song's lyrics are primarily in English, with some Japanese sections.
4. Used the identified lyrics from the search results to populate the scene data. The song is performed by Shishiro Botan and Raora Panthera in the video.
response.global_summary: The video features a duet performance of the song "ILLEXECUTION" by Hololive virtual YouTubers Shishiro Botan and Raora Panthera, as part of a 3D birthday live event. The performance is preceded by a short dialogue between the two characters.

scenes.description: Short dialogue between Shishiro Botan and Raora Panthera before the performance.
Shishiro Botan and Raora Panthera perform "ILLEXECUTION" on a 3D stage.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
The knacks of surviving in this world
are being human and being right
Everyone keeps telling me to grow up fast
And it is so tough, can't wrap my head around it
Your unfair rules
Ego trip into a loop
We do belong nowhere in this world
Yet we are surviving
Getting through anything
Stay alive
Hated ones Naked hearts
Worthless games that never end
Found them in the darkness in the end
